nasb.text: ‘Thus says the Lord God, “I will also make the hordes of Egypt cease By the hand of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon.

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord God: “I will put an end to the wealth of Egypt, by the hand of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon.

cnv.text: 主耶和華這樣說： “‘我必藉著巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒的手， 消滅埃及的財富。

ccb.text: “主耶和华说， “‘我要借巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒的手消灭埃及的百姓。
